name: agent-mail
description: Agent Mail directory/debug shell for native-GUI-first Codex mail. Please enable hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Find this Codex team; prepare native mail.
interface.longDescription: Agent Mail gives Codex agents a native-GUI-first coordination surface. The plugin provides hooks and a team directory while host-native agent_mail tools land in Codex core. Real mail is delivered only by host-native agent_mail tools.
defaultPrompt: You have Agent Mail. Run `agent-mail team` to identify this main/subagent family; `coworkers`, `contacts`, `subagents`, and `ls` are compatibility aliases. Use hosted `agent_mail.write/read` for real mail when Codex exposes them; do not claim CLI write/read delivered GUI mail without a host-native receipt.
